name: IZM Credit Services
description_short: IZM Credit Services offers credit repair in Las Vegas through tradeline addition, dispute services, and hybrid programs. They claim credit score increases of 70-200+ points.
description_long:
IZM Credit Services is a credit repair company operating primarily in Las Vegas with a national footprint across multiple cities (Atlanta, Charlotte, Chicago, Detroit, Jacksonville, Orlando, Miami, New York, Philadelphia, Tampa, Los Angeles, New Orleans, DC). The company positions itself as a full-service credit solution provider, with their website emphasizing fast credit score improvement.

The company offers three primary service models: (1) Tradeline Addition—adding consumers as authorized users to established credit accounts with perfect payment histories and high limits to boost credit files; (2) Traditional Credit Repair—disputing negative items directly with credit bureaus and creditors; and (3) Hybrid Repair—combining both tradeline addition and dispute services. They also offer ancillary services including identity theft recovery, bad credit home buyer programs, and the ability to sell credit (acting as a tradeline provider). Their website includes educational content on credit building, credit cards, and homebuying with bad credit.

IZM distinguishes itself through advertised speed of results (claiming 200+ point increases in 3-4 weeks with tradelines, 70+ points in 4 months with traditional repair) and offering multiple service tiers to match different budgets. They provide free credit analysis and phone-based consultation. Customer testimonials on their site report deletion of multiple negative items and significant score improvements within months.

A key caveat: The company's heavy promotion of tradeline purchasing and authorized user addition raises regulatory and ethical concerns. While they address "Are Tradelines Legal?" on their FAQ, the legality and credit bureau acceptance of purchased tradelines remains contested, and this practice has faced FTC scrutiny. Traditional credit repair claims (70+ points in 4 months) are modest and realistic, but the tradeline promises (200+ points in weeks) are extraordinarily aggressive and should be viewed skeptically. Pricing details are not disclosed on the website, requiring phone contact.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers three distinct repair programs (tradelines, traditional disputes, hybrid) allowing consumers to choose based on budget and needs
Claims rapid results with tradelines (200+ points in 3-4 weeks) compared to traditional repair (70+ points in 4 months)
Provides free 10-minute credit analysis via phone consultation before commitment
Multiple customer testimonials reporting actual deletions (3-4 negative items) and score improvements (100+ points in 3 months)
Operates in 12+ major U.S. cities, not limited to Las Vegas despite company name
Offers supplementary services (identity theft recovery, bad credit home buying guidance)
Educational blog and FAQ content explaining credit concepts and strategy
cons: Tradeline addition model depends on purchasing access to third-party credit accounts, raising concerns about sustainability, regulatory compliance, and whether credit bureaus will continue accepting such tradelines
No pricing information disclosed on website; consumers must call to get cost estimates, which is a common high-pressure sales tactic in the industry
Claims of 200+ point increases in 3-4 weeks are atypically aggressive and difficult to verify; such rapid gains typically require ideal conditions or may not be sustainable
Heavy reliance on tradeline sales rather than disputing legitimate errors; this shifts profit incentive away from removing truly inaccurate negative items
No mention of FTC compliance disclaimers, no clear disclosure of what results are typical vs. exceptional, no timeline guarantees for traditional dispute services
best_for: Consumers with fair-to-good credit (mid-600s to low-700s) who want rapid score boosts for mortgage or major purchase qualification
People with multiple legitimate negative items (collections, late payments, charge-offs) willing to pursue disputes alongside tradeline augmentation
Borrowers in Las Vegas and major metro areas who prefer phone-based personalized consultation over DIY credit repair
Individuals seeking a hybrid approach: removing bad items via disputes while simultaneously adding positive tradeline history
diagnosis: IZM Credit Services is best for consumers seeking aggressive, rapid credit score improvement via tradeline addition combined with traditional dispute services. However, the company's business model depends heavily on tradeline purchasing—a practice of questionable long-term sustainability and regulatory risk. Consumers should verify independently whether purchased tradelines will be accepted by lenders and bureaus before committing, and should expect slower, more reliable results from traditional dispute services alone.
services: Tradeline addition (authorized user placement on established credit accounts with perfect payment history and high limits)
Traditional credit repair (creditor and credit bureau disputes and challenges)
Hybrid credit repair (combining tradeline addition with dispute services)
Free credit analysis and consultation (10-minute phone assessment)
Bad credit home buyer programs and guidance
Credit education content (blog, FAQ, webinars on credit building and homebuying)
Seasoned tradeline inventory and pricing information
Multi-city service (Las Vegas, Atlanta, Charlotte, Chicago, Detroit, Jacksonville, Orlando, Miami, New York, Philadelphia, Tampa, Los Angeles, New Orleans, DC)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3355 W Spring Mountain Rd #51, Las Vegas, NV 89102
